message:
feat(app): add sub-application mounting support

Introduces the mount() method on AppBuilder for mounting independent
sub-applications at path prefixes. Unlike include_router(), mounted apps
maintain complete independence:

- Separate middleware stack (parent middleware does NOT apply)
- Own state and configuration
- OpenAPI schemas are NOT merged
- Request paths have prefix stripped before reaching sub-app

MountedApp struct:
- Stores prefix and the mounted App instance
- Handles path stripping during request dispatch

Use cases:
- Admin panels at /admin with their own auth middleware
- Swagger UI at /docs
- Static file servers
- Legacy/third-party app integration

Example:
```rust
let admin_app = App::builder()
    .get("/users", admin_users)
    .middleware(AdminAuth::new())
    .build();

let main = App::builder()
    .mount("/admin", admin_app)  // GET /admin/users -> admin_users
    .build();
```

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
